text: {"matches":[{"type":"contradicts","fromIndex":0,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Claim 0 asserts a significant reduction in 30‑day mortality, while claim 2 reports no statistically significant reduction for the same outcome."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":0,"toIndex":3,"rationale":"Claim 0 concerns the drug's effect; claim 3 concerns the reliability of that conclusion, which is a different scope."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":1,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Claim 1 describes the issuance of a correction; claim 2 reports the corrected analysis result—different aspects of the same study."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":1,"toIndex":3,"rationale":"Claim 1 is about the correction process; claim 3 is about the trustworthiness of the original conclusion, distinct scopes."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":2,"toIndex":3,"rationale":"Claim 2 gives the corrected result; claim 3 comments on the original conclusion's reliability, which are different scopes."}]}
